name: Gaogamon

signature_move.name: Dash Double Claw
signature_move.description: Approaches the opponent at a speed faster than the eye can see and slashes with the claws on both forepaws.

description: A Beast Digimon that resulted as Gaomon 's physique grew larger, and its claws that were once protected by gloves have grown fully. Although it is a quadruped , its powerful legs also allow it to stand up to attack like a bear. Its Special Moves are approaching the opponent at a speed faster than the eye can see and unleashing its " Dash Double Claw ", and biting the opponent with its sturdy teeth, not letting go until they collapse ( Gaoga Hound ). It can also release a powerful vortex of wind from its mouth in one breath ( Spiral Blow ).
